name: Lebanon
summary: Day 89 of Hormuz blockade (Wednesday May 27). **ISRAEL CROSSED THE LITANI — THE EXPANDED OPERATION IS LAUNCHED; 31+ KILLED INCL. CHILDREN; LEBANON TRIGGER FIRES (CONFIRMED).** Israel expanded its ground operation beyond the security zone and across the Litani River, striking 100+ Hezbollah sites overnight; Lebanon's health ministry reported at least 31 killed including children (Mashghara ~12; a village north of the Litani ~12), with evacuation warnings for Nabatiyeh province (CONFIRMED — Euronews May 27 carrying the Lebanon Health Ministry figures; Algemeiner May 26; Times of Israel liveblogs). Netanyahu: 'The IDF are operating with large forces on the ground and seizing strategic areas.' Washington APPROVED the expansion (warning Israel only against striking in Beirut to protect the Iran talks). The May-25 trigger (US greenlights OR Israel launches an expanded operation against Hezbollah within 14 days, by 2026-06-08) is satisfied on BOTH limbs by confirmed action → moved to active. The expanded op jeopardises the separate US-brokered Israel-Lebanon ceasefire track (next talks June 2-3) and directly collides with Iran's deal precondition that any agreement 'end the war on all fronts including Lebanon' — the unsynchronised Lebanon track is the deal's key vulnerability. PRIOR (May 25): Day 87 of Hormuz blockade (Monday May 25). **LEBANON FRONT HOT — THE 'CEASEFIRE HOLDS / HEZBOLLAH NON-RETALIATION HOLDS' FRAMING IS RETIRED. The April-16 (extended) Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is FRAGILE AND ACTIVELY VIOLATED: Hezbollah — never a formal signatory — has reportedly fired OVER 1,000 DRONES AND OVER 700 ROCKETS at Israel over the past eight days, and IDF Northern Command chief Maj. Gen. Rafi Milo publicly said the command is 'AT WAR' and 'will not tolerate fire on the home front' (campaign CONFIRMED — IDF Northern Command on record; exact 1,000-drone/700-rocket tally REPORTED — single US-official channel relayed by Times of Israel May 25).** A senior US official told Channel 12 + Axios that Washington could GREENLIGHT A LARGER ISRAELI OPERATION against Hezbollah, citing Hezbollah ignoring 'a recent ultimatum'; the IDF has drawn up expanded Lebanon plans (REPORTED — Channel 12 + Axios via TOI). Iran's negotiators treat 'end the war on all fronts including Lebanon' as a precondition of any US-Iran deal (Baghaei restated Monday; an Iranian adviser: 'Without fully restraining America’s rabid dog in Lebanon, there will be no ceasefire'). **Lebanon is now the binding constraint on the Iran deal and the day’s biggest change — the only one of the three structural deal-breakers with a live, escalating kinetic exchange behind it; no expanded ground operation has been launched yet (REPORTED/PREPARATION).** New trigger added at `watching`: US greenlights OR Israel launches an expanded military operation against Hezbollah within 14 days (by 2026-06-08). The existing 'second IDF KIA during 45-day extension' trigger stays as-is; note the kinetic environment has materially intensified beyond the calibrated floor/ceiling described in prior days. PRIOR (May 24): **ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE DAY 8 OF 45-DAY EXTENSION — IDF AIRSTRIKES NABATIEH (MAY 22) + AL-HANIYYA (MAY 21) PER HAARETZ WIRE IMAGERY. NO SECOND IDF KIA — MAY 14 NEGEV DAGAN REMAINS THE ONLY CEASEFIRE-WINDOW CASUALTY INSIDE LITANI-AREA SCOPE. PENTAGON-LED SECURITY TRACK STARTING MAY 29 OPERATIONALLY INTACT.** Israeli airstrikes targeted Nabatieh (May 22) and al-Haniyya (May 21) per Haaretz wire imagery. Lebanese health ministry casualty tracking continues from prior week's 18-killed / 124-wounded reading. **No second IDF KIA across May 19-22** (consistent with May 14 Negev Dagan KIA being the only ceasefire-window casualty inside the Litani-area scope). **Hezbollah has not publicly claimed retaliatory mortar/rocket fire in May 19-22 sweep** — silence is itself the negative-space verification. **Both sides continue to operate within unwritten kinetic floor (IDF strikes) and ceiling (no escalation to mass-casualty IDF events)**. The ceasefire-extension architecture (Pentagon-led security track starting May 29) remains operationally intact. **The 'second IDF KIA in southern Lebanon during 45-day ceasefire extension' trigger (added May 16) remains UNTRIPPED Day 8 of 45.** PRIOR (May 19): **A8 ISRAEL-LEBANON DAY 4 OF 45-DAY CEASEFIRE EXTENSION — KINETIC EXCHANGE CONTINUES WITHIN FLOOR/CEILING; LEBANESE CASUALTIES 18 DEAD + 124 WOUNDED PAST DAY (Haaretz live blog May 17, ms.now); cumulative ~2,987 dead / ~9,236 wounded since March 2 (additive).** IDF reported NO new injuries through Monday morning IST; **no second IDF KIA confirmed.** Litani-induced-Israeli-KIA trigger remains active_fired (Dagan May 14); May 16 'second IDF KIA in southern Lebanon during 45-day ceasefire extension window' trigger remains UNTRIPPED. Both sides continue to operate within unwritten kinetic floor (strikes) and ceiling (no escalation to mass-casualty IDF events). **Pentagon security track scheduled for May 29 launch remains on calendar** (May 16 graph trigger 'Pentagon security track May 29 produces public framework deliverable within 30 days of launch (by 2026-06-28)' remains operative). Al Jazeera May 16 'Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite ceasefire extension' = scare-quoted 'ceasefire' framing Qatari skepticism of architecture; PBS NewsHour and ms.now confirm kinetic continuation; no Hezbollah claim of Israeli mass-casualty event. **PRIOR (May 17): LEBANON CEASEFIRE DAY 3 OF 45-DAY EXTENSION — CONTINUED KINETIC EXCHANGE WITHIN UNWRITTEN FLOOR/CEILING.** On Saturday May 16, IDF conducted strikes 'throughout the day on several areas in southern Lebanon' (Al Jazeera May 16 'Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite ceasefire extension' — scare-quotes positioning architecture as nominal): Tayr Falsayh (Nabatiyeh), Yanouh, Shahabiya, Qaqaiyat al-Sanoubar (Sidon district), Tuffahta, Ghassaniya, Kawthariyat al-Sayyad. Lebanese health ministry: **2,969 cumulative dead and 9,112 wounded since March 2.** On Sunday morning May 17, **Hezbollah fired several rockets and explosive drones at IDF troops in southern Lebanon** (CONFIRMED — IDF statement, Times of Israel May 17 liveblog primary). Rockets and several drones shot down; some drones exploded near Israeli forces; **NO INJURIES — IDF explicitly stated.** One drone triggered sirens in Misgav Am. **The Litani-induced-Israeli-KIA trigger now counts down at Day 4 of 14 inside the 45-day extension window; the 'second IDF KIA during 45-day extension' trigger added May 16 remains UNTRIPPED.** The architecture-collapse scenario has been further deferred — 48 hours of no second IDF KIA despite continued kinetic exchange validates the cabinet's choice to extend. **Both sides operating within an unwritten kinetic floor and ceiling under the formal ceasefire**: Hezbollah striking IDF without killing IDF; IDF striking Hezbollah infrastructure without conducting Beirut-suburb operations. **PRIOR (May 16):** ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE EXTENDED 45 DAYS to ~2026-06-29 with PENTAGON-LED SECURITY TRACK to begin May 29** (CONFIRMED — US State Department announcement May 15, Bloomberg 'Israel, Lebanon Extend Ceasefire 45 Days After Washington Talks,' PBS NewsHour, CGTN, Euronews, Times of Israel liveblog, India TV, CNBC, ms.now, usnews, Foreign Policy). State Department spokesperson Tommy Pigott called the talks 'highly productive.' **Lebanon 'welcomed the extension'** (Times of Israel liveblog primary). Hezbollah was not a participant in the talks but expressed conditional acceptance via SG Naim Qassem's prior 'categorically rejects direct talks' line that does not block Karam-Dermer bilateral. Lebanese officials hoped the negotiations would pave the way for 'tackling thorny issues including the withdrawal of Israeli forces from southern Lebanon and the disarmament of Hezbollah.' Foreign Policy framed it as 'Trump's Lebanon Negotiations Are Breaking the Country' — opposite framing. **The Litani-induced Israeli KIA trigger that fired Day 2 of 14 yesterday continues to count down — the ceasefire extension does not retroactively un-fire the trigger** (Day 3 of 14). **Critically: NO SECOND IDF KIA IN SOUTHERN LEBANON SINCE DAGAN MAY 14 per available reporting through May 16 morning** — the 14-day window's worst-case (second KIA collapses the architecture) has not materialised in the first 48h. **The architecture-collapse scenario the brief warned of has been DEFERRED, NOT FORECLOSED.** Pentagon-led security architecture beginning May 29 substantively elevates the process from State-led ambassadorial to Pentagon-led security architecture. Lebanese press carries the Pigott 'highly productive' line; Lebanese centre-left framing emphasizes Israeli withdrawal timeline as the test. The 512 Lebanese killed by Israeli strikes since April 17 ceasefire (carried forward) remains the structural humanitarian backdrop. PRIOR (May 15): **A4 LITANI-INDUCED ISRAELI KIA TRIGGER FIRED DAY 2 OF 14: Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan, 20, Golani Brigade 12th Battalion killed by Hezbollah mortar fire near the Litani May 14** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel primary, JNS, i24News, Haaretz, Israeli MoD primary). Total IDF war toll 937. Hezbollah launched 24 attacks on IDF positions, soldiers and military vehicles in southern Lebanon over 24-hour window per Al Jazeera; Dagan KIA is one consequence. **A3 ISRAEL-LEBANON WASHINGTON TALKS DAY 2 CLOSED — STATE DEPARTMENT 'PRODUCTIVE AND POSITIVE'** (Haaretz May 15 liveblog primary). Lebanese delegation under Simon Karam pressed for Israeli troop withdrawal timeline + Lebanese-prisoner release; Israeli delegation under Ron Dermer maintained no immediate withdrawal + prioritized Hezbollah disarmament. **CRITICAL DATE CORRECTION: April-23-extended ceasefire expires 'early hours of Sunday' = May 17, NOT May 15 as yesterday's brief recorded.** Reuters/Manila Times reporting that statement will announce ceasefire extension. **Lebanese Health Ministry: 512 Lebanese killed by Israeli strikes since the April 17 ceasefire implementation** (Al Jazeera May 15). Lebanese press: 13 killed in southern Lebanon strikes (Jibsheet, Kfar Dounine, Nabatieh) including child, woman, Lebanese army member. Lebanese framing (Al Jazeera, Madamsr) emphasizes 512 dead and continued Israeli operations beyond Litani; Israeli framing (JPost, JNS, Haaretz) emphasizes Hezbollah disarmament. **The Litani-KIA firing on Day 2 of 14 stress-tests the Washington architecture exactly as the talks attempt to extend the ceasefire** — Lebanese cabinet under Aoun-Salam faces same political-pressure inversion as Israeli cabinet, with talks pre-positioned for extension announcement. PRIOR (May 14): IDF 'weeklong raid' beyond Litani; Litani-KIA trigger added at Day 1 of 14; talks Day 1. NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH, LED BY THE GOLANI BRIGADE'S RECONNAISSANCE UNIT — meaningful UPGRADE of yesterday's 'first publicly-acknowledged Litani crossing': IDF itself is now framing the operation as sustained week-long campaign, not one-off crossing** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog May 13, JNS, Haaretz). Killed 'some 15 Hezbollah operatives' past 24h; 'some 45 Hezbollah targets' total over 24h including command centres, surveillance posts, weapon depots. Hezbollah fired explosive drones at Israel May 13 — drones triggered Iron Dome interceptor over southern Lebanon that IDF later said was false alarm. Lebanese press: 13 killed in southern Lebanon strikes (Jibsheet, Kfar Dounine, Nabatieh) including child, woman, Lebanese army member; 2 Israeli soldiers wounded (CNN). **NO new Israeli soldier KIA in past 24 hours — new 'Litani-induced Israeli KIA within 14 days' trigger added yesterday is at Day 2 of 14 and HAS NOT activated.** **MAJOR STRUCTURAL FACT: STATE DEPARTMENT CONFIRMED PRIMARY: third round of US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington May 14-15, Lebanese delegation led by Simon Karam, Israeli delegation led by Ron Dermer, agenda explicitly including 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah' alongside 'full restoration of Lebanese state authority'**. The April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires around May 15, exactly as talks finish — timing choreographed. Ceasefire status verbal (Zamir's 'no ceasefire' carries forward); coalition-vs-establishment-vs-IDF triangle widens. PRIOR (May 13): (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog primary May 12). Operation targeted Hezbollah military structures in overnight strikes; explosive drones at troops landed in open areas. **IDF CHIEF OF STAFF EYAL ZAMIR: 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' — most senior IDF officer publicly declaring ceasefire dead.** Lebanese Health Ministry ≥13 killed in Israeli attacks over prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,704 killed / 8,311 wounded (Lebanese tally appears to draw from different reference framework than yesterday's 2,869; either way cumulative count rising daily). Hezbollah continues precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan (Press TV / Iranian state). NO new Israeli soldier KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 since ceasefire, but Litani crossing materially raises casualty + miscalculation risk. CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated. **Litani crossing is a CONFIRMED escalation of ground-tempo beyond air strikes — IDF crossed an unofficial post-ceasefire line BEYOND the May 11 Beirut southern-suburb strike.** ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12): **IDF STRIKES INTENSIFIED — 30+ LOCATIONS HIT MAY 11 across south and east Lebanon (evacuation warnings for Rihan, Jarjouaa, Kfar Roummane, Nmairiyeh, Arab Salim, Jmaijmeh, Mashgharah, Qellaya, Harouf); drone strike Zebdine killed 2 civilians distributing bread; airstrike on Abba killed 2/wounded 5; FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE.** Lebanese Health Ministry: ≥23 killed prior 24h; **cumulative war toll 2,869.** May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3 strikes), Haris (1 strike, 7th cumulative on Haris), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded (Lebanese NNA). **HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONE STRIKE NEAR MANARA (just inside Israel) MAY 10 ~16:00 KILLED IDF RESERVIST WO ALEXANDER GLOVANYOV** = 5th IDF soldier killed post-April 16 ceasefire (all by FPV/explosive drones); Glovanyov is SOLDIER not CIVILIAN, **MAY 10 trigger for Israeli civilian casualty from Hezbollah EXPIRED UNTRIPPED, holds through May 12.** Civilian-inside-Israel ceiling has HELD across full window. **NEW VARIABLE MAY 12:** surface-to-air missile fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft over south Lebanon; IDF launched interceptor; alerts triggered along Israel's Mediterranean coast (REPORTED — CGTN single-source, needs Israeli-side corroboration). Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11 (artillery/drones/missiles at Khiam, Deir Seryan, Tayr Harfa, Bayyada, Rashaf, Naqoura) — Hezbollah-side CLAIMED, Israeli side reported only Glovanyov KIA. **Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes May 11: war 'not over' until proxies neutralized; Haaretz framed as Netanyahu signaling Hezbollah fighting may continue DELIBERATELY after ceasefire.** Asymmetry continues: 2,869+ Lebanese killed cycle vs zero Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks. **The Beirut southern-suburb strike May 11 is a meaningful escalation marker — IDF crossed an unofficial post-ceasefire line.**

active_triggers.condition: US greenlights OR Israel launches an expanded military operation against Hezbollah in Lebanon within 14 days (by 2026-06-08)
active_triggers.activation_note: FIRED ON BOTH LIMBS (CONFIRMED ACTION, 2026-05-27). Israel LAUNCHED the expanded ground operation beyond the security zone and across the Litani River (Netanyahu 'seizing strategic areas'; 100+ Hezbollah sites struck; Lebanon Health Ministry 31+ killed incl. children; Nabatiyeh evacuation warnings) AND Washington APPROVED the expansion (warning only against Beirut to protect the Iran talks). Verified by multiple operational sources (Euronews May 27, Algemeiner May 26, ToI liveblogs, Lebanon Health Ministry) — legitimate activation, not eager activation on rhetoric. Iran's 'all fronts including Lebanon' deal precondition is now breached; the separate US-brokered Israel-Lebanon ceasefire track (June 2-3 talks) is jeopardised.
active_triggers.note: The binding constraint on the Iran deal. Iran treats 'end the war on all fronts including Lebanon' as a precondition of any US-Iran MOU (Baghaei restated May 25). A US official (Channel 12 + Axios via TOI May 25) signalled Washington could greenlight a larger Israeli operation against Hezbollah after a reported 1,000+ drones / 700+ rockets over 8 days; IDF has drawn up expanded Lebanon plans. If the greenlight converts to a launched operation, Iran's 'all fronts' precondition is breached and the deal stalls/collapses.

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty within 14 days (by 2026-05-11) — full re-escalation activated
active_triggers.note_2026-05-25: Kinetic environment has materially intensified — Hezbollah drone/rocket campaign now reported at 1,000+ drones / 700+ rockets over 8 days; IDF Northern Command 'at war'. Status left as-is.

recent_signals.headline: **ISRAEL CROSSED THE LITANI — EXPANDED GROUND OPERATION LAUNCHED; 31+ KILLED INCL. CHILDREN; EVACUATION WARNINGS FOR NABATIYEH; LEBANON TRIGGER FIRES (CONFIRMED ACTION).** Israel expanded its ground operation beyond the security zone and across the Litani River in southern Lebanon, striking 100+ Hezbollah sites (storage, command centres, observation posts) overnight; Netanyahu said 'The IDF are operating with large forces on the ground and seizing strategic areas.' Lebanon's health ministry reported at least 31 killed including children — Mashghara ~12 dead, a village north of the Litani ~12 dead — with evacuation warnings issued for Nabatiyeh province (CONFIRMED — Euronews May 27 carrying the Litani-crossing + casualty detail, Algemeiner May 26, Times of Israel liveblogs). Washington APPROVED the expansion but WARNED Israel against striking in Beirut to avoid damaging the Iran talks; a senior Israeli official said targeted assassinations in Beirut are permitted 'if an operational opportunity presents itself.' The May-25 trigger ('US greenlights OR Israel launches an expanded operation against Hezbollah within 14 days, by 2026-06-08') is now satisfied on BOTH limbs — launch AND approval — and moves to active. The escalation jeopardises the separate US-brokered Israel-Lebanon ceasefire track (next talks scheduled June 2-3) and directly collides with Iran's deal precondition that any agreement 'end the war on all fronts including Lebanon' — the two tracks have no synchronisation mechanism and Hezbollah signs nothing, which is the deal's key vulnerability (Chatham House structural read, now confirmed). Context: Hezbollah fired 1,000+ drones and 700+ rockets at Israel over the preceding eight days (REPORTED tally).
sources: Euronews 'Israel expands military ground operations in Southern Lebanon' May 27 (Litani-crossing + Lebanon Health Ministry casualty detail) — primary
Algemeiner 'Israel Expands Ground Operation Beyond Demarcation Line' May 26
Times of Israel liveblogs May 26-27 (Netanyahu 'seizing strategic areas'; 100+ sites struck; US approval/Beirut warning)
Lebanon Health Ministry (31+ killed incl. children; Mashghara / north-of-Litani village; Nabatiyeh evacuation warnings)
recent_signals.verification: Expanded ground operation launched beyond the security zone and across the Litani = CONFIRMED ACTION (Euronews May 27 + Algemeiner May 26 + ToI liveblogs; Netanyahu on record 'seizing strategic areas'); 100+ Hezbollah sites struck + 31+ killed incl. children (Mashghara ~12; north-of-Litani village ~12) + Nabatiyeh evacuation warnings = CONFIRMED (Lebanon Health Ministry via Euronews); US approval + warning against Beirut = CONFIRMED; Beirut-assassination permission 'if an operational opportunity presents itself' = REPORTED (senior Israeli official); 1,000+ drones / 700+ rockets in 8 days = REPORTED (single US-official channel via ToI). Lebanon trigger FIRED on both limbs = CONFIRMED ACTION, multiple operational sources — legitimate activation.

recent_signals.headline: **LEBANON FRONT HOT — 'CEASEFIRE HOLDS / HEZBOLLAH NON-RETALIATION HOLDS' FRAMING RETIRED; THE APRIL-16 (EXTENDED) ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE IS FRAGILE AND ACTIVELY VIOLATED.** Per a senior US official relayed by Channel 12 and Axios (via Times of Israel May 25 liveblog), over the past EIGHT DAYS Hezbollah has fired 'over a thousand drones and over 700 rockets' at Israel — an apparent bid to derail the Israel-Lebanon talks; the same official said Washington 'could greenlight a larger Israeli operation against Hezbollah in Lebanon,' noting Hezbollah ignored 'a recent ultimatum,' and the IDF has drawn up expanded Lebanon plans amid concern the Iran deal could curb its freedom to fight Hezbollah. IDF Northern Command chief Maj. Gen. Rafi Milo said the command is 'at war' in Lebanon and 'will not tolerate fire on the home front.' **Hezbollah was never a formal ceasefire signatory.** Iran treats 'end the war on all fronts including Lebanon' as a deal precondition (Baghaei restated Monday; an Iranian adviser per House of Saud: 'Without fully restraining America’s rabid dog in Lebanon, there will be no ceasefire'). **The two tracks have no synchronisation mechanism — the MOU could declare the Lebanon war over before any Hezbollah disarmament/monitoring framework exists.** New trigger added at watching: US greenlights OR Israel launches an expanded military operation against Hezbollah within 14 days (by 2026-06-08). No expanded ground operation launched yet — the prospective operation is REPORTED/PREPARATION, not a confirmed action.
sources: Times of Israel May 25 liveblog 'US likely to greenlight larger Israeli operation' (Channel 12 + Axios) — primary
Times of Israel 'IDF draws up Lebanon plans'
Washington Post May 13 'Hezbollah's unjammable drones' (independent corroboration of the campaign)
House of Saud 'Lebanon Clause' (analyst framing of the precondition)
recent_signals.verification: Kinetic campaign (Hezbollah drone/rocket fire + Israeli strikes ongoing) = CONFIRMED ACTION (IDF Northern Command chief Milo 'at war' on record; casualties); the exact '1,000+ drones / 700+ rockets in 8 days' tally = REPORTED (single US-official channel relayed by TOI; directionally corroborated by independent reporting of an intensifying drone campaign); US 'greenlight' signal + IDF expanded Lebanon plans = REPORTED (Channel 12 + Axios); Iran 'all fronts incl. Lebanon' precondition = CONFIRMED (Baghaei on record); Iranian-adviser quote = CLAIMED (House of Saud analyst relay); expanded operation NOT yet launched = REPORTED/PREPARATION.

recent_signals.headline: **ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE EXTENSION DAY 5 OF 45 — NO SECOND IDF KIA; LEBANESE HEALTH MINISTRY CONTINUES TO COUNT CASUALTIES FROM IDF STRIKES (May 16 Harouf strike killed at least 6 including 3 paramedics per Al Jazeera).** Lebanese President Joseph Aoun's 'continuing violations' framing remains active. **Hezbollah non-retaliation pattern through Day 5 is the cleanest signal that Iran's proxy network is operating in TWO modes simultaneously**: aggressive RHETORIC on the Houthi-Haifa axis (Saree announcement today), restrained ACTION on the Hezbollah-Lebanon axis. Consistent with Iran's preferred posture of preserving multiple proxy options while declining to use any in ways that would consolidate a US/Israeli kinetic-escalation case. Trigger 'Second IDF KIA in southern Lebanon during 45-day extension window (by ~2026-06-29)' remains watching.
sources: Lebanese health ministry (via Al Jazeera relay)
recent_signals.verification: Lebanese casualties from IDF strikes = CONFIRMED (Lebanese health ministry primary); no second IDF KIA = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; Hezbollah non-retaliation = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

recent_signals.headline: **DAY 4 OF 45-DAY CEASEFIRE EXTENSION — KINETIC EXCHANGE CONTINUES WITHIN UNWRITTEN FLOOR/CEILING. Lebanese health ministry: 18 killed + 124 wounded past day of IDF strikes** (Haaretz live blog May 17, ms.now); cumulative ~2,987 dead / ~9,236 wounded since March 2 if applied additively. **IDF reported NO new injuries through Monday morning IST; no second IDF KIA confirmed.** Litani-induced-Israeli-KIA trigger from Day 2 of 14 (Dagan mortar killing) remains active_fired; May 16 'second IDF KIA in southern Lebanon during 45-day ceasefire extension window' trigger remains UNTRIPPED. Both sides continue to operate within unwritten kinetic floor (strikes) and ceiling (no escalation to mass-casualty IDF events). **Pentagon security track scheduled for May 29 launch remains on calendar** — May 16 graph trigger 'Pentagon security track May 29 produces public framework deliverable within 30 days of launch (by 2026-06-28)' remains operative. Al Jazeera May 16 'Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite ceasefire extension' = scare-quoted 'ceasefire' framing Qatari skepticism of architecture; PBS NewsHour and ms.now confirm kinetic continuation; no Hezbollah claim of Israeli mass-casualty event.
sources: Haaretz live blog May 16-17 (Lebanese casualty figures)
ms.now 'As Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire by 45 days'
Al Jazeera May 16 'Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite ceasefire extension'
recent_signals.verification: Lebanese health ministry casualty figures = CONFIRMED (Haaretz + ms.now); IDF no-new-injuries = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source; Pentagon May 29 track on calendar = CONFIRMED (State Dept primary May 15 carries forward); Al Jazeera scare-quoted ceasefire framing = CONFIRMED Qatari editorial framing.

recent_signals.headline: **LEBANON CEASEFIRE DAY 3 OF 45-DAY EXTENSION — IDF AND HEZBOLLAH EXCHANGED KINETIC ACTIVITY THROUGH WEEKEND; NO SECOND IDF KIA.** On Saturday May 16, IDF conducted strikes 'throughout the day on several areas in southern Lebanon' targeting Hezbollah infrastructure: Tayr Falsayh (Nabatiyeh), Yanouh, Shahabiya, Qaqaiyat al-Sanoubar (Sidon district), Tuffahta, Ghassaniya, Kawthariyat al-Sayyad (Al Jazeera May 16 'Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite ceasefire extension'). Lebanese health ministry: **2,969 cumulative dead and 9,112 wounded since March 2.** On Sunday morning May 17, **Hezbollah fired several rockets and explosive drones at IDF troops in southern Lebanon** (CONFIRMED — IDF statement, Times of Israel May 17 liveblog primary). Rockets and several drones shot down; some drones exploded near Israeli forces; **NO INJURIES — IDF explicitly stated.** One drone triggered sirens in Misgav Am. **The Litani-induced-Israeli-KIA trigger continues to count down at Day 4 of 14 inside the 45-day extension window; the 'second IDF KIA during 45-day extension' trigger added May 16 remains UNTRIPPED.** Both sides operating within unwritten kinetic floor and ceiling under the formal ceasefire. The architecture-collapse scenario has been further deferred.
sources: Times of Israel May 17 liveblog (IDF statement on Hezbollah drones + rockets, no injuries)
Al Jazeera May 16 'Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon continue despite ceasefire extension'
Lebanese health ministry casualty data (2,969 dead / 9,112 wounded cumulative since Mar 2)
Al Jazeera village/town list (Tayr Falsayh, Yanouh, Shahabiya, Qaqaiyat al-Sanoubar, Tuffahta, Ghassaniya, Kawthariyat al-Sayyad)
recent_signals.verification: IDF strikes on southern Lebanon villages May 16 = CONFIRMED ACTION (Al Jazeera primary geographic detail); Hezbollah drone/rocket fire at IDF May 17 = CONFIRMED ACTION (IDF primary statement, ToI liveblog); NO INJURIES = CONFIRMED (IDF explicit statement); Lebanese health ministry cumulative casualties = CONFIRMED (Lebanese primary); Litani-KIA window Day 4 of 14 = CONFIRMED ABSENCE (no second IDF KIA reported).

recent_signals.headline: **A4 LITANI-INDUCED ISRAELI KIA TRIGGER FIRED DAY 2 OF 14: Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan, 20, Golani Brigade 12th Battalion killed by Hezbollah mortar fire near the Litani May 14** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel primary, JNS, i24News, Haaretz, Israeli MoD primary). Total IDF war toll 937. Hezbollah launched 24 attacks on IDF positions, soldiers and military vehicles in southern Lebanon over 24-hour window per Al Jazeera; Dagan KIA is one consequence. **A3 ISRAEL-LEBANON WASHINGTON TALKS DAY 2 CLOSED — STATE DEPT 'PRODUCTIVE AND POSITIVE'** (Haaretz May 15 liveblog primary). Karam pressed for Israeli troop withdrawal timeline + Lebanese-prisoner release; Dermer maintained no immediate withdrawal + prioritized Hezbollah disarmament. **DATE CORRECTION: April-23-extended ceasefire expires 'early hours of Sunday' = May 17, NOT May 15 as yesterday's brief recorded.** Reuters/Manila Times reporting statement will announce ceasefire extension. **Lebanese Health Ministry: 512 Lebanese killed by Israeli strikes since April 17 ceasefire implementation** (Al Jazeera). Lebanese press: 13 killed in southern Lebanon strikes (Jibsheet, Kfar Dounine, Nabatieh) including child, woman, Lebanese army member. The Litani-KIA firing stress-tests the Washington architecture exactly as the talks attempt to extend the ceasefire — Lebanese cabinet under Aoun-Salam faces same political-pressure inversion as Israeli cabinet.
sources: Times of Israel May 15 (Dagan KIA primary)
Haaretz May 15 liveblog ('productive and positive' State Dept primary)
Al Jazeera May 15 (512 Lebanese killed since April 17)
recent_signals.verification: Dagan KIA = CONFIRMED ACTION (Times of Israel primary + JNS + i24News + Haaretz + Israeli MoD); KIA trigger fired Day 2 of 14 = CONFIRMED; Washington talks Day 2 'productive and positive' = CONFIRMED (State Department primary via Haaretz); ceasefire-extension expectation = REPORTED (Reuters/Manila Times, not signed text yet); ceasefire-expiry May 17 = CONFIRMED multi-cluster; 512 Lebanese killed since April 17 = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry via Al Jazeera); 13 killed past 24h = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry via CNN).

recent_signals.headline: **A7 IDF ANNOUNCED MAY 13 IT CARRIED OUT A 'WEEKLONG RAID' BEYOND THE LITANI RIVER NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH, LED BY THE GOLANI BRIGADE'S RECONNAISSANCE UNIT** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog May 13, JNS, Haaretz). IDF itself framing operation as sustained week-long campaign, not one-off crossing. 'Some 15 Hezbollah operatives' killed past 24h; 'some 45 Hezbollah targets' total over 24h. Lebanese press: 13 killed in southern Lebanon strikes (Jibsheet, Kfar Dounine, Nabatieh) including child, woman, Lebanese army member. **NO new Israeli soldier KIA past 24h — Litani-induced KIA-within-14-days trigger at Day 2/14 NOT activated.** **MAJOR: State Department CONFIRMED PRIMARY: third round US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington May 14-15, Lebanese delegation Simon Karam, Israeli delegation Ron Dermer, agenda explicitly includes 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah' + 'full restoration of Lebanese state authority' = material structural anchoring**. April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires May 15 as talks finish — choreographed. Hezbollah fired explosive drones at Israel May 13; Iron Dome triggered, IDF later said false alarm. 2 Israeli soldiers wounded (CNN).
sources: Times of Israel 'IDF says it carried out weeklong raid on Hezbollah sites beyond Lebanon's Litani River' May 13
JNS 'WATCH: IDF tank strike kills Hezbollah terrorist in Lebanon'
US State Department primary 'Next Meeting Between the Governments of the United States, Lebanon, and Israel'
CFR 'Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extended for Three Weeks'
CNN Day 75 liveblog (13 killed Lebanon, 2 IDF wounded)
recent_signals.verification: IDF weeklong Litani raid = CONFIRMED ACTION (IDF own framing primary, ToI/JNS/Haaretz secondary); Washington talks May 14-15 = CONFIRMED (State Department primary); Lebanese casualty figures = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry via CNN); Litani-KIA trigger NOT activated = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

recent_signals.headline: A7 IDF GROUND TROOPS CROSSED LITANI RIVER MAY 12 NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH (~10 KM from border) = FIRST PUBLICLY-ACKNOWLEDGED ISRAELI GROUND CROSSING OF LITANI SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE (CONFIRMED — ToI liveblog primary). Operation targeted Hezbollah military structures in overnight strikes; explosive drones at troops landed in open areas. IDF Chief Eyal Zamir: 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' = MOST SENIOR IDF OFFICER PUBLICLY DECLARING CEASEFIRE DEAD. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥13 killed prior 24h; cumulative toll 2,704 killed / 8,311 wounded (reference-framework discrepancy with yesterday's 2,869; count rising daily either way). Hezbollah continued precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan (Press TV / Iranian state attribution). NO new Israeli soldier KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 but Litani crossing materially raises casualty + miscalculation risk. CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated. Net escalation: IDF crossed unofficial post-ceasefire line BEYOND May 11 Beirut southern-suburb strike.
sources: Times of Israel liveblog May 12 (Litani crossing) — primary
Press TV (via Global Security Org) Hezbollah strikes — Iranian state
recent_signals.verification: Litani ground crossing May 12 = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel liveblog primary); Zamir 'no cease-fire' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (IDF Chief on record); Lebanese cumulative casualty 2,704 (revised reference framework) = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry primary); Hezbollah strike attributions = REPORTED (Press TV / Iranian state); SAM May 12 = REPORTED CGTN single-source.

recent_signals.headline: IDF STRIKES INTENSIFIED — 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 (evacuation warnings 9 villages); Zebdine drone strike killed 2 civilians distributing bread; Abba airstrike killed 2/wounded 5; FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,869. May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3), Haris (1, 7th cumulative), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded. Hezbollah drone strike near Manara May 10 killed IDF reservist Glovanyov = 5th IDF soldier KIA post-ceasefire (SOLDIER not CIVILIAN — May 10 trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS through May 12). May 12: SAM fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft (CGTN single-source, needs Israeli-side corroboration). Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11. Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes: war 'not over' until proxies neutralized; Haaretz frames as deliberate war-extension signal.
sources: Al Jazeera + Lebanese NNA + Wikipedia 2026 Lebanon war timeline + Detroit News + Democracy Now (IDF strikes Lebanon)
recent_signals.verification: IDF strikes 30+ locations + first Beirut southern-suburb strike since April 16 = CONFIRMED multi-source; Lebanese cumulative toll 2,869 = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry primary); Glovanyov KIA = CONFIRMED multi-source; civilian-trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS; SAM May 12 = REPORTED (CGTN single-source); Netanyahu 60 Minutes 'not over until proxies neutralized' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC

recent_signals.headline: DAY 14/14 OF TRIGGER WINDOW (closes today; trigger UNTRIPPED) — IDF STRUCK 85+ HEZBOLLAH TARGETS IN SOUTHERN LEBANON IN 24 HOURS (INCL. UNDERGROUND WEAPONS SITE IN BEQAA VALLEY, AFTER EVACUATION WARNINGS FOR 9 VILLAGES); 12 KILLED INCL. 7 IN SINGLE SAKSAKIYEH STRIKE (A GIRL AMONG THE DEAD); HEZBOLLAH DRONES WOUNDED 3 IDF RESERVISTS NEAR MISGAV AM (MILITARY TARGETS ONLY); MT. MERON DRONE IMPACT CORRECTED — IN TERRITORY ADJACENT TO LEBANON BORDER, NOT MERON AREA; 2 SOLDIERS WOUNDED (ONE SERIOUSLY). Coordination-decay framework holds: capability demonstrated on both sides, but civilian-inside-Israel ceiling has HELD. Trigger window expires today with trigger UNTRIPPED. Asymmetry continues: Lebanese casualties cumulating, ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks.
sources: Times of Israel May 9-10 live blogs
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED multi-source — IDF 85+ targets primary; 12 Lebanese killed incl. Saksakiyeh primary multi-source; 3 IDF reservists wounded by Hezbollah drones = CONFIRMED (JPost, IDF acknowledged); Mt. Meron correction = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel correction); trigger UNTRIPPED Day 14/14

recent_signals.headline: DAY 13/14 OF TRIGGER WINDOW — HEZBOLLAH FIRST CROSS-BORDER DRONE REACH OF CYCLE: 'SWARM OF DRONES' STRUCK MT. MERON IDF AIR-TRAFFIC-CONTROL BASE INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER MAY 8 (MILITARY TARGET, NO CASUALTIES); ISRAELI AIRSTRIKES KILLED 5-10 LEBANESE FRIDAY (PARAMEDIC, 2 CHILDREN, 3 WOMEN AT TOURA, KFAR CHOUBA, OTHERS); 4 HEZBOLLAH MEMBERS KILLED IN BAFLIYEH CAR STRIKE SATURDAY; TRIGGER 'ISRAELI CIVILIAN CASUALTY INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER' UNTRIPPED. Hezbollah dialed capability without breaking ceiling — military targeting + no casualties = coordination-decay framework holds. Mt. Meron is IDF's primary northern air-traffic-control facility ~8 km from Lebanon border. Day 14 (~May 10) last day of originally-flagged window.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED multi-source — Mt. Meron drone swarm + Lebanese casualties + Bafliyeh strike all multi-source; trigger UNTRIPPED at Day 13/14 (capability demonstrated, ceiling intact)

recent_signals.headline: ISRAELI ESCALATION IN LEBANON DESPITE IRAN PAUSE: BEIRUT SUBURBS STRIKE MAY 6 KILLED HEZBOLLAH RADWAN COMMANDER MALEK BALLOUT (FIRST ISRAELI STRIKE ON LEBANESE CAPITAL SINCE MID-APRIL CEASEFIRE); 13 KILLED SOUTHERN/EASTERN LEBANON MAY 5-6; FORCED DISPLACEMENT ORDERS FOR 12 VILLAGES (mostly north of Litani — outside occupation zones, in violation of April 16 ceasefire). PM Netanyahu personally announced ordering Beirut strike. Day 11/14 trigger window — Hezbollah HAS NOT retaliated; ALL casualties Lebanese, ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED multi-source — Beirut strike + Ballout killing + 13 casualties + 12-village displacement orders all multi-source confirmed; Hezbollah non-retaliation = CONFIRMED via absence-of-action documented by all sources

recent_signals.headline: DAY 10/14 TRIGGER WINDOW — HEZBOLLAH ROCKETS+DRONE NO IDF CASUALTIES; IDF SUCCESSFULLY INTERCEPTED AERIAL TARGETS BEFORE ISRAELI TERRITORY; GERMAN FM BAERBOCK 'EVERY RIGHT' FRAMING; ASYMMETRY FRAMEWORK 2,659+ LEBANESE KILLED VS ZERO ISRAELI CIVILIANS
IDF STRUCK 20+ SOUTH LEBANON LOCATIONS MAY 4; HEZBOLLAH MORTARS RETALIATED (NO IDF CASUALTIES); ONE-SIDED TEMPO CONTINUES; DAY 9/14 TRIGGER WINDOW NO ISRAELI CIVILIAN CASUALTY
LEBANON 80+ KILLED 48 HOURS BY IDF STRIKES — CEASEFIRE OPERATIONALLY DEAD MAY 1-2
KINETIC DAY 2 — IDF STRUCK 20+ HEZBOLLAH-LINKED SITES MONDAY; 14-DAY ISRAELI-CIVILIAN-CASUALTY TRIGGER STILL WATCHING
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED IDF strike count + CONFIRMED Lebanese Mo

recent_signals.headline: SUBSTANTIVE CEASEFIRE COLLAPSED: HEZBOLLAH LETHAL DRONE KILLED IDF SGT

historical_summaries.summary: 6 signals. Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon against Hezbollah | At least 41 killed in Israeli air attacks on Bekaa Valley | Lebanese PM Salam demanded Hezbollah surrender weapons and restrict to political activities

31 signals. Beirut airstrike killed Hezbollah's southern front commander Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem on April 1 — the most senior Hezbollah commander kill | Israel struck Lebanon April 1 concurrent with Trump primetime address and ongoing Iran campaign | Israeli strikes killed 2 girls and wounded 40 near Tyre
